fullText: This video will show you how to set up autoimp import for new GitHub repositories in Sona Cube Cloud. Start by navigating to administration and select organization settings. Then click on the organization binding tab. Toggling the feature on will ensure that every time a new repo is created in GitHub, a corresponding project in Sona Cube Cloud will be created and an analysis kicked off. And that's it. You're all set. We highly recommend adding a security contact if you haven't already. This will ensure that any critical security communication sonar reach the right teams instantly. Thanks for watching and happy coding.
